name: Advantech Co., Ltd.
lede: Advantech runs two centers across two Indian cities. Pune and Bengaluru, covering R&D and engineering & design, built over fourteen years.
insight: Search elsewhere and you will usually find one Advantech office in India. We map two, across two cities, each tagged by center type and function. Knowing the whole footprint is what turns a name on a list into an account you can plan against.
metaTitle: Advantech Co., Ltd. GCC in India: Centers, Footprint & Leaders | Bamboo Reports
metaDescription: Advantech runs 2 verified centers across 2 Indian cities (Pune, Bengaluru), covering R&D and engineering & design. See the full India footprint, org map and contacts on Bamboo Reports.

about.description: Advantech's India footprint covers Pune and Bengaluru, spanning R&D and engineering & design. The centers deliver IT, R&D and ER&D, Sales & Marketing and Customer Support for the group's global operations.

bandCopy: Exact center locations, per-center headcount, the technology stack and all three decision-makers, in one profile.

faq.q: How many centers does Advantech operate in India?
faq.a: Advantech operates 2 active centers in India.

faq.q: Which Indian cities does Advantech have centers in?
faq.a: Advantech's India footprint includes Pune and 1 additional city.

faq.q: What types of centers does Advantech run in India?
faq.a: Advantech runs R&D and 1 additional center type in India.

faq.q: How many people work at Advantech's India centers?
faq.a: Aggregate and center-level headcount for Advantech's India operations is available in the full profile.

faq.q: Who leads Advantech's GCC in India?
faq.a: Bamboo Reports tracks leaders at Advantech's India centers, across GCC leadership. Names and contact details open with a free account.

sources: company filings, LinkedIn, NASSCOM and Bamboo Reports' primary research
